title: Deck
description: Manifest for a slide deck. Lives at decks/<name>/deck.json.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema. Optional, but enables editor autocomplete.

title.description: Human-readable deck title (shown in the viewer).

description.description: One-line summary of what the deck is for.

slides.description: Ordered list of slides. Each entry is a path from project root, either 'slides/...' (shared) or 'decks/<name>/slides/...' (deck-local).
